name: SnapCam Pro
description: Capture photos, record webcam video, and save background screen recordings in a polished local studio.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src 'self' blob:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none';
